arts.ttl: Lautaro Martinez Going Through Prolonged Rough Stretch
arts.sum: Inter haven’t been spotless in the early going, and the poor form of Lautaro Martinez has been a significant factor. They have left four points on the table against Genoa and Monza, while they routinely crushed the minnows last season. The post Lautaro Martinez Going Through Prolonged Rough Stretch appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Man City star Rodri discovers his main rival who could stop him winning Ballon d'Or
arts.sum: Arsenal great Emmanuel Petit feels Manchester City midfielder Rodri would be a worthy winner of the Ballon d'Or and picks out the only player who can stop him collecting the iconic trophy

arts.ttl: Lee Dixon makes Arsenal claim as they hunt down Man City
arts.sum: The Gunners got their Premier League title bid back on track with victory over Tottenham in Sunday's North London derby

arts.ttl: Duo left out of Inter squad for Champions League game vs Man City
arts.sum: Inter‘s Federico Dimarco and Marko Arnautovic did not train with the rest of the team...

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola loses key Man City dressing room figure on day 115 charges hearing begins
arts.sum: Manchester City are set to be in the courtroom with the Premier League this week but have also been forced to bid farewell to a long-serving and popular member of staff in the meantime

arts.ttl: 'It's beneficial for Chelsea, Arsenal, Liverpool, Man Utd for Man City to look bad': City expert reacts to 115 charges hearing
arts.sum: Man City expert Steven McInerney from Esteemed Kompany admits to Sports Mole that it is beneficial for Premier League clubs including Chelsea, Arsenal, Liverpool and Man United for the Citizens to "look bad" amidst the 115 charges against them.

arts.ttl: Seedorf sees clear Champions League target for Juve, Milan and Inter and makes Ancelotti prediction
arts.sum: Former Milan star Clarence Seedorf feels Inter, Milan and Juventus ‘must’ qualify for the Champions...

arts.ttl: Manchester City's lawyers arrive for day two of club's trial of the century - after 'top-secret' location of the legal battle was revealed
arts.sum: Manchester City's lawyers have arrived at the International Dispute Resolution Centre (IDRC) for the second day of their high-profile hearing.

arts.ttl: Ilkay Gundogan's Man City return hailed as 'masterstroke' that shows Pep Guardiola bond
arts.sum: Ilkay Gundogan has returned to Man City after a difficult year at Barcelona, with former Arsenal and Chelsea star Emmanuel Petit hailing the move a masterstroke by Pep Guardiola
